fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Build me a robotic arm with three joints"
"Create a legged robot that can stand on its own"
"Design a wheeled robot with a grabber attachment"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Make my four-wheeler drive in a figure-eight pattern"
"Simulate what happens when the robot hits a wall"
"Add realistic friction and gravity to my scene"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Add a ramp obstacle to the empty room scene"
"Give my robot a new sensor to detect objects nearby"
"Set up a second vehicle and have them race"
